← Back to Sponsorship
Sponsorship — IRC §513(i)

Become an
ODIPA Sponsor

Sponsorship is a public acknowledgment relationship — your organization supports ODIPA's mission and we recognize you by name and logo across our platforms. Sponsors do not receive services, deliverables, or program access.

Looking for services? Training, certification, research, and technical support are Corporate Partnership engagements — not sponsorships. Different agreement, different tax treatment.

Organization Details

Sponsorship Interest

We respond to all inquiries within 2 business days

ODIPA is a 501(c)(3) tax-exempt nonprofit. Sponsorship contributions may be tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law.

EIN: 33-2725121

What Sponsorship Includes

Recognition only — no services or deliverables

  • ✓Name & logo on ODIPA website
  • ✓Acknowledgment in annual report
  • ✓Social media recognition post
  • ✓Logo in email newsletter footer
  • ✓Recognition on event materials
  • ✓IRC §513(i) qualified payment receipt

Review the Agreement

All sponsors sign ODIPA's Sponsorship Agreement before activation. Request a copy to review with your legal team before submitting this form.

Request Sponsorship Agreementpartnerships@odipa.org

Need Services Instead?

Training, certification, research sponsorship, and technical support are Corporate Partnership engagements — governed by a separate agreement.

View Corporate Partnership →
Organization for Digital Information Privacy & Awareness

Educating consumers and organizations about digital information privacy — advocating for practices and policies that protect people in an increasingly data-driven world.

ODIPA is funded through individual donations, corporate sponsorships, and foundation grants.

Privacy Newsletter

Privacy digest: breach alerts, new laws, research releases.

No spam, ever. Unsubscribe any time. We never sell your data. Privacy Policy
